mapper.insert: insert into course_evaluation (student_id, student_name, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, rating, content, teacher_evaluation, evaluation_time) values (#{student_id}, #{student_name}, #{course_id}, #{course_name}, #{teacher_id}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{teacher_evaluation}, #{evaluation_time})
mapper.select: select * from course_evaluation order by evaluation_time desc
select * from course_evaluation where student_id = #{student_id} and course_id = #{course_id}
